findings.title: HTTPS Not Used
findings.description: The target is accessible over plain HTTP without TLS encryption.
findings.remediation: Enforce HTTPS by redirecting all HTTP traffic to HTTPS. Obtain a free certificate from Let's Encrypt.

findings.title: Missing Header: Content-Security-Policy
findings.description: Missing Content-Security-Policy (CSP) header. Allows XSS and data injection attacks.
findings.evidence: Header 'Content-Security-Policy' not present in HTTP response.
findings.remediation: Add a strict CSP: Content-Security-Policy: default-src 'self'; ...

findings.title: Missing Header: Strict-Transport-Security
findings.description: Missing HTTP Strict Transport Security (HSTS). Allows downgrade attacks.
findings.evidence: Header 'Strict-Transport-Security' not present in HTTP response.

findings.title: Sensitive Path Exposed: /.git/HEAD
findings.description: The path '/.git/HEAD' returned HTTP 200 with 23 bytes. This may expose sensitive data.
findings.remediation: Restrict access to '/.git/' via web server configuration or remove the exposed directory.

findings.title: SQL Error Disclosure (MySQL)
findings.description: The server returned a MySQL SQL error message in the response.
findings.evidence: Error pattern: 'You have an error in your SQL syntax'
findings.remediation: Use parameterized queries / prepared statements. Never expose raw database errors to users.

findings.title: Missing Header: X-Frame-Options
findings.description: Missing X-Frame-Options. Page can be embedded in iframes (clickjacking risk).
findings.evidence: Header 'X-Frame-Options' not present in HTTP response.

findings.title: Missing Header: X-Content-Type-Options
findings.description: Missing X-Content-Type-Options. Browser may MIME-sniff responses.
findings.evidence: Header 'X-Content-Type-Options' not present in HTTP response.

findings.title: Potential Reflected XSS
findings.description: Parameter 'test' value is reflected in the HTML response without apparent encoding.
findings.evidence: Param: test=hello | Reflected in response body | Status: 200
findings.remediation: Encode all user-supplied input before reflecting it in HTML. Implement a strict CSP.

findings.title: Missing Header: Referrer-Policy
findings.description: Missing Referrer-Policy. Sensitive URL data may leak to third parties.
findings.evidence: Header 'Referrer-Policy' not present in HTTP response.

findings.title: Missing Header: Permissions-Policy
findings.description: Missing Permissions-Policy. Browser features not restricted.
findings.evidence: Header 'Permissions-Policy' not present in HTTP response.

findings.title: Information Disclosure: Server
findings.description: Server header discloses technology version information.
findings.remediation: Remove or mask the 'Server' header in your web server config.
